evidence_hint: src/llm.ts:26-31 `fetch(`${opts.baseUrl}/chat/completions`, {headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${opts.apiKey}`}...})`. baseUrl is an arbitrary config string with no https:/scheme validation before the bearer token is attached.
residual_if_not_resolved: Reject non-https: baseUrl (or require explicit allow-insecure opt-in) before sending the Authorization header; optionally allowlist hosts.
